text:
MCP-kafka

#apachekafka

An open-source MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for Apache Kafka, built with Quarkus. Enables AI assistants like Claude, Goose, and Gemini to interact with Kafka clusters and Schema Registry.

https://t.co/aqVt81DU3N
name: Igor De Souza

text:
GitHub builds an immune system for AI coding agents running on MCP

GitHub has launched dependency and secret scanning for its Model Context Protocol server to stop security leaks in AI-assisted coding workflows
